appDesc.message: Open and edit downloaded CSV files with the built-in edit-csv editor, fully offline.

fileOpenError.message:
Could not open the local CSV file.

Make sure "Allow access to file URLs" is enabled for this extension (chrome://extensions → Edit CSV → Details), then reload the file.

fileAccessHintText.message: Tip: enable “Allow access to file URLs” for this extension so downloaded and local CSV files open directly in this editor.
